message:
feat(readwrite): add native Rust Pajek parser for cargo-fuzz coverage

Implements read_pajek() and read_digraph_pajek() methods in EdgeListEngine
for parsing Pajek (.net) network format files. This enables cargo-fuzz
coverage of the Pajek parser boundary, which was previously NetworkX-delegated.

Format support:
- *Vertices section with ID and optional quoted labels
- *Edges section (undirected) with optional weights
- *Arcs section (directed) with optional weights
- Comments (% prefix) and empty lines

Mode behavior:
- Strict: fails on malformed input or *Arcs in undirected parse
- Hardened: recovers with warnings, converts *Arcs to undirected

Added fuzz_pajek target to CI smoke (60s) and nightly soak (1h).

Closes franken_networkx-2tei

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -276,6 +276,8 @@ jobs:
         run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_node_link corpus/fuzz_node_link -- -max_total_time=60
       - name: Fuzz attribute value coercion paths (60s)
         run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_attribute_value corpus/fuzz_attribute_value -- -max_total_time=60
+      - name: Fuzz Pajek parser (60s)
+        run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_pajek corpus/fuzz_pajek -- -max_total_time=60
       # E7: Structure-aware algorithm fuzzers (30s each)
       - name: Fuzz shortest path algorithms (30s)
         run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_shortest_path corpus/fuzz_shortest_path -- -max_total_time=30

@@ -56,6 +56,8 @@ jobs:
             corpus: fuzz_node_link
           - target: fuzz_attribute_value
             corpus: fuzz_attribute_value
+          - target: fuzz_pajek
+            corpus: fuzz_pajek
           # E7: Structure-aware algorithm fuzzers
           - target: fuzz_shortest_path
             corpus: fuzz_shortest_path

@@ -89,3 +89,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_clustering"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_clustering.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_pajek"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pajek.rs"
+doc = false
